summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ATC Master Platform iteration 2 - Staff, Clients, Invoices, and Reports management pages. All backend APIs (18/18) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used: 1 staff (Daniel Hayward), 1 client (Shaun Case), 1 invoice (ATC-2026-001), 1 report (Daily Shift Report)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All management pages tested and working: Staff Management (displays staff with compliance status, 7 compliance documents), Client Management (displays clients with NDIS info, goals, likes, triggers), Invoices (displays invoices with NDIS codes and totals), Reports (displays shift reports with participant info and mood). All modals working: Staff detail, Add Staff form, Client detail, Invoice detail with line items, Report detail. Navigation between all pages via sidebar working correctly.
